gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/90)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/90)
text: قَالَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) يَعِيشُ الْوَلَدُ لِسِتَّةِ أَشْهُرٍ وَ لِسَبْعَةِ أَشْهُرٍ وَ لِتِسْعَةِ أَشْهُرٍ وَ لَا يَعِيشُ لِثَمَانِيَةِ أَشْهُرٍ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Abu Abdullah, from his fathe, from Wahab,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘He will live, the child of six months, and of seven months, and of nine months, but he will not live, (the child of) eight months’.
en.sarwar: 2. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn abu ‘Abd Allah from his father from Wahab who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that ’Amir al-Mu’minin has said, ‘A child (born after) six, seven or nine months lives but one who is born after eight months cannot live.’”
